techStack: Go 1.22+, labstack/echo/v4, gorm.io/gorm + gorm.io/driver/postgres, PostgreSQL 15+, Redis 7+, github.com/casbin/casbin/v2 + casbin/gorm-adapter/v3, golang-jwt/jwt/v5, go-playground/validator/v10, spf13/viper, spf13/cobra, google/uuid, stretchr/testify + testcontainers-go, swaggo/swag + swaggo/echo-swagger
build: Makefile (migrate, seed, serve, test, lint, docker-build), docker-compose.yml for local dev (Postgres + Redis + API)
conventions: RBAC mandatory (no hardcoded perms), soft deletes required (deleted_at), permissions as DB records (resource:action format), RBAC-with-domains Casbin model, stateless JWT 5-15 min + refresh tokens in DB 30 days
structure: cmd/api/main.go (cobra CLI), internal/{config,database,http/{server,middleware,handler,request,response},domain,repository,service,permission,auth,module}, migrations/, config/, pkg/, tests/{unit,integration,contract}, docs/
notes: Momus review identified 37 issues (7 clarity, 3 verifiability, 7 completeness, 9 consistency). 5 critical blockers fixed: CB-1 Casbin model (pre-existing), CB-2 unique token_hash constraint added, CB-3 audit log GET endpoint added, CB-4 scope semantics documented (service-layer hint, not Casbin), CB-5 user CRUD completed. Additions: GET /me, GET /users, DELETE /users/:id, GET /roles, DELETE /roles/:id, DELETE /users/:id/roles/:roleId, DELETE /users/:id/permissions/:pid, GET /me/sessions, DELETE /me/sessions/:id, GET /audit-logs. Clarifications: token rotation mandatory (not optional), access token 15 min fixed, graceful shutdown 30s timeout, load test: 1000 req/s for 5 min with p99 <200ms, business logic = services + handlers.
